Container.Name: RomRepo
Container.Overview: Self-hosted rom/ISO library manager - like Jellyfin for your emulation collection. Scans a folder-per-platform library, pulls box art and metadata from IGDB, and serves a clean web UI with user accounts, custom roles, and mandatory TOTP MFA. Authenticated downloads work on LAN or over the internet. First visit walks you through creating the admin account; add free IGDB (Twitch dev) credentials in Settings for artwork.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the RomRepo web interface

Config.Name: ROM Library
Config.Description: Your rom/ISO library root. One subfolder per platform (snes, ps2, gba, ...). Read-only is recommended.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Database, box art cache, and secret key

Config.Name: Session Length (hours)
Config.Description: How long sign-in sessions last before requiring password + TOTP again
